home.summary: can move toward qualification but need more than Haaland service alone

home.summary: are still alive but need more ambition against the group's strongest side

keyPlayers.name: Vinicius Junior
keyPlayers.note: Brazil's main starting runner if Neymar is managed from the bench, built to punish any open channel.

keyPlayers.name: Casemiro
keyPlayers.note: The midfield stabilizer who lets Brazil attack while still protecting the counter.

keyPlayers.name: Neymar
keyPlayers.note: Available again after injury, but current reports expect him to be managed rather than starting.

away.summary: are boosted by Neymar's availability but likely start through Vinicius' speed
